title: agrostis stolonifera var. vulgaris
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. vulgaris, commonly known as common creeping bentgrass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. vulgaris include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting immunomodulatory effects. Agrostis stolonifera var. vulgaris can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
